articles.title: Getting Started with React
articles.excerpt: Learn how to use React Hooks to manage state and side effects in functional components. This comprehensive guide covers useState, useEffect, and custom hooks with practical examples.

author.name: Shahnawaz Alam
author.bio: Shahnawaz is the WebDev Lead at AWSCC, full-stack developer with expertise in modern web technologies and cloud infrastructure. He helps teams build scalable applications and implement DevOps practices.
